name: sync-security-issue
description: Synchronize a security issue in <tracker> with the state of its GitHub discussion, the <security-list> mailing thread, and any <upstream> PRs that fix it. The skill gathers all relevant signals, proposes label, milestone, assignee, field and draft-email updates, and only applies changes the user has explicitly confirmed. Suggests the next step in the handling process and prints the CVE allocation link when a CVE is needed.
